creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #10)
I can now confirm that upstream Bugzilla does not have this fix in their trees --
either for 5.0.4 or 5.2 or 'master'.

Their last commit to this file seems to have been:

https://github.com/bugzilla/bugzilla/commit/adceb1cda6441d2969ed5a3d6d45add6f33c6df7

which I believe we have.
